name: @adaptivejs/web
description: Official web target for Adaptive, including runtime, SSR, and hydration.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/ft && npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/core && npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/common && npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/ssr && node ../scripts/build-package.mjs web && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/ft && npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/core && npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/common && npm run build --workspace @adaptivejs/ssr && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
